pages.text: A settlement grows by drawing in new citizens. A well-fed, housed, content settlement attracts immigrants over time; a starving or overcrowded one does not. Beds and steady food generation are the two biggest levers on growth.
Every new citizen is another worker but also another mouth. Grow your food and housing ahead of your population, not behind it.
Registration tablets and papers let another player join your settlement as a member. Each era raises how many registration documents you can issue.
